mapper.update: UPDATE sales_summary SET match_qty = match_qty + #{qty}, barcode = #{barCode}, current_num = current_num + #{qty} WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET qty = qty - #{qty} WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
UPDATE sales_summary SET match_qty = match_qty - #{qty}, current_num = current_num - #{qty} WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE sales_summary SET match_qty = match_qty - #{qty}, current_num = 0.0 WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 3
mapper.select:
SELECT C.CUSTOMER_CODE customerCode,C.CUSTOMER_NAME customerName,A.DOC_NO docNo,CONVERT(varchar(10), A.DOC_DATE, 120) docDate,A.REMARK remark, (SELECT TOP 1 CUSTOMER_ORDER_NO FROM SALES_ORDER_DOC X LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC_D Y ON X.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID=Y.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC_SD Z ON Y.SALES_ORDER_DOC_D_ID=Z.SALES_ORDER_DOC_D_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D K ON Z.SALES_ORDER_DOC_SD_ID=K.SOURCE_ID_ROid WHERE K.SALES_DELIVERY_ID=A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID) customerNo FROM SALES_DELIVERY A LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_BUSINESS_ID=A.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM SALES_DELIVERY_D B WHERE A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID=B.SALES_DELIVERY_ID AND B.BUSINESS_QTY-B.ISSUED_QTY>0)
AND ( SELECT TOP 1 CUSTOMER_ORDER_NO FROM SALES_ORDER_DOC X LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC_D Y ON X.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID=Y.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC_SD Z ON Y.SALES_ORDER_DOC_D_ID=Z.SALES_ORDER_DOC_D_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D K ON Z.SALES_ORDER_DOC_SD_ID=K.SOURCE_ID_ROid WHERE K.SALES_DELIVERY_ID=A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID ) LIKE CONCAT('%',#{customerNo},'%')
AND A.DOC_DATE >= #{startTime}
AND #{endTime} >= A.DOC_DATE
ORDER BY A.DOC_DATE DESC

SELECT DISTINCT C.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode,C.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName FROM SALES_DELIVERY A LEFT JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D B ON A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID=B.SALES_DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE C ON B.WAREHOUSE_ID=C.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE B.BUSINESS_QTY-B.ISSUED_QTY>0 AND A.DOC_NO IN
#{item}

SELECT org_no orgNo,barcode,item_no itemCode, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec,unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitName, qty,sn_warehouse_no warehouseCode, sn_warehouse_name warehouseName,sn_cell_no binCode,remark,combination_lot_no lotCode, org_no shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barCode}

SELECT id, item_code itemCode, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, business_qty planQty, match_qty deliveryQty, doc_no docNo, unit_no unitCode, ISNULL(bin_code,'') binCode, warehouse_code warehouseCode, barcode barCode,customerNo, shjg shjg, current_num currentNum, unit_name unitName FROM sales_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} -- AND match_qty != 0
SELECT barcode,item_no itemCode, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, unit_no unitNo, qty,warehouse_no warehouseCode,cell_no binCode,remark FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy}

SELECT id, item_code itemCode, business_qty businessQty, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, match_qty matchQty, doc_no docNo, unit_no unitNo,bin_code binCode, warehouse_code warehouseCode, barcode barCode,shjg shjg, current_num currentNum FROM sales_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY item_code
SELECT ISNULL(RIGHT('0000' + CAST(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(barcode, 4) AS INT)) + 1 AS VARCHAR(4)), 4), '0001') FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode LIKE #{queryBarCode} + '%'

SELECT id,warehouse_no warehouseNo, ISNULL(cell_no,'') cellNo, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode, qty, unit_no unitNo, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy,create_date createDate FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 3
SELECT SUM(qty) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE barcode = #{barCode} AND chag_type = #{chagType}

SELECT id, warehouse_no warehouseNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, barcode, qty, unit_no unitNo, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, create_date createDate, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT count(1) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 3
SELECT Owner_Org_ROid FROM MO WHERE DOC_NO = #{moNo}

SELECT TOP 1 A.DOC_NO docNo, S.DOC_NO salesNo, U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, U.UNIT_NAME unitName, C.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode, D.ITEM_CODE itemCode, D.ITEM_NAME itemName, D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, B.BUSINESS_QTY planQty, B.ISSUED_QTY deliveryQty, B.BUSINESS_QTY - B.ISSUED_QTY unDeliveryQty, Z.UDF021 binCode, (SELECT TOP 1 CUSTOMER_ORDER_NO FROM SALES_ORDER_DOC X LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC_D Y ON X.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID = Y.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC_SD Z ON Y.SALES_ORDER_DOC_D_ID = Z.SALES_ORDER_DOC_D_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D K ON Z.SALES_ORDER_DOC_SD_ID = K.SOURCE_ID_ROid WHERE K.SALES_DELIVERY_ID = A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID) customerNo, P.PLANT_CODE shjg FROM SALES_DELIVERY A LEFT JOIN SALES_DELIVERY_D B ON A.SALES_DELIVERY_ID = B.SALES_DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN SALES_ORDER_DOC S ON S.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID = B.SALES_ORDER_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE C ON B.WAREHOUSE_ID = C.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM D ON D.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = D.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON D.STOCK_UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT P ON P.PLANT_ID = A.PLANT_ID WHERE B.BUSINESS_QTY - B.ISSUED_QTY > 0 AND A.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND D.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode}
mapper.insert: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND item_code = #{itemCode}) BEGIN INSERT INTO sales_summary(id,item_code,item_name,item_spec,business_qty,match_qty,create_by,create_time,doc_no,unit_no,bin_code,warehouse_code,customerNo,shjg,current_num,unit_name,barcode) VALUES (NEWID(),#{itemCode},#{itemName},#{itemSpec},#{businessQty},#{deliveryQty},#{createBy},GETDATE(),#{docNo},#{unitCode},#{binCode},#{warehouseCode},#{customerNo},#{shjg},#{currentNum},#{unitName},#{barcode}) END ELSE BEGIN UPDATE sales_summary SET match_qty = match_qty + #{currentNum}, current_num = current_num + #{currentNum}, barcode = #{barcode} WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND item_code = #{itemCode} END
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SalesOutboundTaskDetail WHERE synced = 0
AND docNo = #{docNo}

SELECT TOP #{limit} id, barcode, warehouseCode, binCode, qty, docNo, salesNo, customerDocNo, unitCode, itemCode, itemName, itemSpec, orgNo, status, createTime, createBy, plan_qty planQty FROM SalesOutboundTaskDetail WHERE synced = 0 ORDER BY id
mapper.update:
UPDATE SalesOutboundTaskDetail SET synced = 1, sync_time = GETDATE() WHERE id IN
#{item}
